mapper.sql: id, api_id, `name`, record_date, enter_number, rest_number,income, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select * from (select * from scenic_enter_people where name = '九寨沟' or name = '古藏寨' or name = '甲勿海' or name = '嫩恩桑措(神仙池)' or name = '爱情海(甘海子)' or name = '甲勿海大熊猫保护研究园' ORDER BY record_date desc limit 1000) a GROUP BY name
mapper.insert:
insert into scenic_enter_people (id, api_id, `name`, record_date, enter_number, rest_number, income,create_time, update_time ) values
( #{item.id}, #{item.apiId}, #{item.name}, #{item.recordDate}, #{item.enterNumber}, #{item.restNumber},
#{item.enterNumber}*259,
#{item.enterNumber}*100,
#{item.income},
#{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
on duplicate key update enter_number = values(enter_number), rest_number = values(rest_number), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select sum(enter_number) as num from scenic_enter_people where (name = '九寨沟' or name = '古藏寨' or name = '甲勿海' or name = '嫩恩桑措(神仙池)' or name = '爱情海(甘海子)' or name = '甲勿海大熊猫保护研究园') and record_date between #{startTime} and #{endTime}
